tam_notes: $30B by 2030 (IBEF, RedSeer). India has 500M+ learners; 250M students in K-12. Online education penetration only 6% in 2024.
avg_arpu_notes: Annual subscription ₹5,000–₹1,50,000 depending on segment (K-12 vs. MBA prep)
regulatory_note: Online education largely unregulated; AICTE and UGC norms apply to degree programs only

tam_notes: India is processing $1T+ in digital payments/year (UPI alone). Lending market ₹150 lakh crore. Insurance GWP ₹9.9 lakh crore. Wealth management ₹50 lakh crore AUM.
avg_arpu_notes: Varies massively: payments ₹0 ARPU (MDR zero for UPI P2P) to ₹50,000+ for wealth management
regulatory_note: RBI regulates NBFCs, payment aggregators, and digital lending. SEBI regulates wealth/investment products. IRDAI for insurance.

tam_notes: India's agriculture economy is $500B. AgriTech addresses inputs ($30B), output marketing ($100B), credit ($40B), advisory, and machinery. 600M+ Indians dependent on agriculture.
avg_arpu_notes: Farmer ARPU ₹3,000–₹25,000/year depending on service (market linkage platform vs. full-stack agri service)
regulatory_note: FSSAI regulates food; NSAI for standards. eNAM for commodity markets. State APMC laws vary — critical to understand per state.

tam_notes: India's healthcare market: $372B by 2030. Digital health subset: $372B includes telemedicine ($32B), health insurance tech, diagnostics, hospital management, pharma tech. 1.4B population with 0.7 doctors/1000 people.
regulatory_note: Telemedicine Practice Guidelines 2020 (MoH&FW). Medical devices under CDSCO. ABDM interoperability standards mandatory for digital health records. DPIIT recognition helpful for health startups.

tam_notes: India's D2C market estimated at $100B by 2025 (NASSCOM). 800M+ internet users; 220M+ online shoppers. 700+ VC-backed D2C brands in 2024. Driven by Instagram/YouTube brand discovery.
avg_arpu_notes: Average order value ₹500-1,500; repeat customers 4-6 purchases/year → ₹3,000-8,000 annual ARPU
regulatory_note: Consumer Protection (E-Commerce) Rules 2020. FSSAI for food. Legal metrology for product labeling. BIS certification for electronics.

tam_notes: India's SaaS market: $10B (2024), projected $50B by 2030 (NASSCOM). India is #2 global SaaS country by companies. 1,500+ SaaS companies; 15 SaaS unicorns. Selling to global customers from India.
avg_arpu_notes: SMB SaaS: ₹10,000-1,00,000/year. Enterprise: ₹5,00,000-50,00,000/year. Global customer ARPUs in USD: $500-$50,000/customer/year.
regulatory_note: Data localization (DPDP Act 2023) requirements increasing. GST 18% on SaaS. SEBI compliance for FinSaaS. SOC2 / ISO27001 expected by enterprise clients.

tam_notes: Government target: 30% EV penetration by 2030 (30M EVs). India sold 15 lakh 2-wheelers, 50,000 4-wheelers, 1.5 lakh 3-wheelers as EVs in FY24. FAME III scheme support.
avg_arpu_notes: E-scooter: ₹1,00,000-1,50,000 one-time. Charging station: ₹2,000-5,000/month subscription. Battery-as-a-service: ₹3,000/month.
regulatory_note: FAME III scheme ongoing. AIS 156 safety standards for EV batteries. BIS 2027 for charging connectors. State road tax exemptions vary.

tam_notes: India's logistics market: $215B (2024). Cost of logistics: 14% of GDP (global avg 8%) — massive efficiency opportunity. E-commerce logistics subset: $6B. Cold chain: $10B. B2B supply chain tech: $20B.
key_drivers: PM Gati Shakti (₹100 lakh crore infrastructure plan)
avg_arpu_notes: B2B: Revenue per shipment ₹80-150 for domestic courier. Per truck/trip varies. SaaS layer: ₹50,000-5,00,000/year per enterprise client.
regulatory_note: Motor Vehicles Act for fleet. FSSAI for cold chain food transport. Customs for cross-border. PM Gati Shakti portal for infrastructure linkage.

tam_notes: India: 568M+ mobile gamers (2023) — world's largest gaming user base by count. Revenue only $3.8B — monetization gap vs. US and China is the opportunity. Fantasy sports (Dream11) ₹16,000 crore.
key_drivers: Cheap data (JIO effect: ₹150/month for unlimited data)
Android smartphone saturation at ₹6,000 price point
avg_arpu_notes: Casual gaming ARPU: ₹200-500/year. Fantasy sports active users: ₹5,000-15,000/year entry fees. Esports: ₹2,000-10,000 tournament fees.
regulatory_note: Online gaming regulated by MeitY. Skill vs. chance distinction critical for real-money games. GST 28% on real-money gaming (October 2023 change) significantly impacted RMG industry.

tam_notes: India committed to Net Zero by 2070 and 500GW renewable capacity by 2030. $250B climate investment opportunity. Solar already $8B industry. Green hydrogen, carbon markets, EVs are emerging.
avg_arpu_notes: Solar RESCO: ₹4-7/kWh. Carbon credit: ₹500-2,500/tonne CO2. Green hydrogen: ₹300-400/kg (declining).
regulatory_note: MNRE (Ministry of New & Renewable Energy) governs. CERC for electricity markets. BEE for energy efficiency. Carbon markets: BKT trading starting 2026.

tam_notes: India real estate market: ₹65 lakh crore ($780B). PropTech: $3.2B (2024) → $8B by 2028. 10M+ homes expected to be built annually. Commercial real estate: 800M sqft stock.
key_drivers: RERA (Real Estate Regulatory Authority) pushing transparency
Affordable housing demand (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana)
PropTech adoption by large developers (Godrej, DLF)
avg_arpu_notes: NoBroker subscription: ₹2,000-10,000/transaction. Developer SaaS: ₹5,00,000-20,00,000/year. Co-living per bed: ₹8,000-25,000/month.
regulatory_note: RERA registration mandatory for developers. Stamp duty 4-8% varies by state. MahaRERA, TNRERA prominent. Digital registry emerging (Karnataka, AP).

tam_notes: India's organized workforce: 500M+. Formal sector with HR software penetration: 50M employees. Only 20% of SMEs use HR software — massive greenfield. Also India exports HRMS SaaS globally.
key_drivers: GST compliance driving payroll software adoption
Labor codes consolidation (4 codes replacing 29 laws) creating new compliance requirements
avg_arpu_notes: Per employee/year ₹1,500-5,000. Enterprise deals ₹10,00,000-50,00,000/year. SMB payroll SaaS ₹5,000-15,000/month.
regulatory_note: PF (EPFO) and ESI compliance mandatory for 20+ employees. TDS on salary. New labour codes (effective date TBD). Sexual Harassment Act (POSH) compliance tracking.

tam_notes: India's GWP (gross written premium): ₹9.9 lakh crore (2024). Insurance penetration: only 4.2% of GDP vs. global 7%. Digital insurance intermediaries fast-growing. IRDAI's Bima Sugam (insurance marketplace) launching.
key_drivers: IRDAI sandbox regulations enabling InsurTech experiments
Ayushman Bharat coverage driving health insurance awareness
avg_arpu_notes: Health insurance premium: ₹5,000-25,000/year. Motor: ₹3,000-8,000/year. Life: ₹8,000-50,000/year premium. Sachet: ₹100-500.
regulatory_note: IRDAI licenses required for brokers/aggregators. CAGRs regulated. Bima Sugam integration required from 2025. Sandbox for InsurTech new products.

tam_notes: India has 1.5M+ lawyers, 3,500+ courts. Legal services market: ₹12,000 crore. LegalTech still nascent — massive white space. Contract management, legal research, compliance automation are fastest growing.
key_drivers: SEBI/RBI compliance burden on financial entities
avg_arpu_notes: Enterprise CLM: ₹5,00,000-20,00,000/year. SMB legal subscription: ₹12,000-60,000/year. Legal AI tools: ₹5,000-25,000/month.
regulatory_note: Bar Council of India regulates law practice — technology companies can provide tools but cannot provide legal advice. e-courts API for court data access.

tam_notes: India has 31 lakh+ NGOs. CSR mandate (Section 135, Companies Act) requires ₹30,000+ crore/year in social spending. Government welfare schemes: ₹10 lakh crore/year in direct benefit transfers. Impact investing growing 25% YoY.
key_drivers: CSR mandate creates guaranteed demand from corporates
DBT (Direct Benefit Transfer) ₹6 lakh crore/year digitizing welfare
avg_arpu_notes: Revenue models vary: CSR platform SaaS ₹5,00,000-20,00,000/year from corporates. Blended finance: grant + revenue share. Microfinance: 22-26% interest on group loans.
regulatory_note: FCRA (Foreign Contribution Regulation Act) for foreign donations. Section 12A/80G for tax exemption. CSR activities governed by Schedule VII, Companies Act 2013.
sources: Omidyar Network India Impact Economy Report
